title: FR-EVT-* event ID registry + standardization (typed event taxonomy)
goal: Land the canonical FR-EVT-* event ID registry as a typed Rust enum + JSON manifest so every cluster X emission (mailbox backpressure, MT cancellation, checkpoint overflow, span lifecycle, replay phases, escalation, starvation) uses a registered ID instead of a free-form string. Eliminates the silent typo / drift risk that plagues string-based event taxonomies.
expected_diff_shape: New Rust module src/backend/handshake_core/src/observability/fr_events.rs with `FrEventId` enum + `FrEventRegistry`; new JSON manifest .GOV/roles_shared/records/FR_EVENT_REGISTRY.json; unit tests under src/backend/handshake_core/tests/fr_event_registry_tests.rs.
unblock_conditions: MT-196 span primitives merged so FR-EVT-SPAN-* events can be bound to span types.
implementation_notes: Define `FrEventId` enum with one variant per registered ID. Initial taxonomy covers cluster X emissions: `MailboxBackpressure`, `MailboxRoutingDenied`, `MailboxLeaseAcquired`, `MailboxLeaseExpired`, `MailboxLeaseTakeover`, `MtCancelRequested`, `MtCancelForced`, `MtCancelCleanupFailed`, `MtStarved`, `MtExecError`, `Mt015DistillationCandidate` (alias for FR-EVT-MT-015 from folded stub), `CheckpointOverflow`, `CheckpointShutdownForced`, `ReplayStarted`, `ReplayProgress`, `ReplayCompleted`, `ReplayFailed`, `RestartResumeStarted`, `RestartResumeSessionResumed`, `RestartResumeSessionRecoveryFailed`, `RestartResumeDbUnavailable`, `RestartResumeCompleted`, `SpanStarted`, `SpanEnded`, `SpanFailed`. Each variant maps to a canonical string ID like `FR-EVT-MAILBOX-BACKPRESSURE`, retrievable via `FrEventId::as_str() -> &'static str` and `FrEventId::from_str(s) -> Result<FrEventId, UnknownEventId>`. JSON manifest at .GOV/roles_shared/records/FR_EVENT_REGISTRY.json mirrors the enum: `{ schema: "handshake.fr_event_registry@1", version: "1.0.0", events: [ { id: "FR-EVT-MAILBOX-BACKPRESSURE", kind: "emission", subsystem: "role_mailbox", added_in_wp: "WP-KERNEL-004", schema_fields: [{ name: "role_id", kind: "string" }, ...] }, ... ] }`. A unit test asserts Rust enum + JSON manifest are byte-byte aligned (every enum variant has a JSON entry and vice versa). Every cluster X site that previously had a string literal for an FR event ID MUST switch to `FrEventId::MtCancelRequested.as_str()` (this is a refactor obligation propagated to MT-182/186/188/189/191/192/193/195 — the registry MT lands the type and the others adopt it on their own MT). Tests: (a) round-trip enum<->string for every variant; (b) JSON manifest parse + schema check; (c) Rust + JSON alignment test enumerates both sides and asserts equality; (d) unknown event ID round-trip returns UnknownEventId error.
risk_if_missed: Without a typed registry, every site emits free-form strings; typos slip in (FR-EVT-MAILBOX-BACKPRESURE vs FR-EVT-MAILBOX-BACKPRESSURE); diagnostics panel filters break silently; the folded stub's 'new FR event families' invariant becomes a string-soup.
validator_focus: Rust enum and JSON manifest provably aligned (test fails if either drifts); every variant has a documented schema_fields description; .GOV/roles_shared/records/ JSON validated via JSON Schema (forward-compat for HBR-INT-001 registry pattern).

implementation_record.completed_by_session: KERNEL_BUILDER-20260523-031814-AGT-X4 (parallel subagent; hit Anthropic session rate-limit at ~05:53 before authoring its own implementation_record; parent KERNEL_BUILDER-20260523-031814 verified test green + transitioned lifecycle)
implementation_record.summary: FrEventId enum extended in src/backend/handshake_core/src/flight_recorder/fr_event_registry.rs (PATH_SHAPE_DRIFT: contract names src/observability/fr_events.rs but actual extends the existing flight_recorder module). Variants cover the cluster X taxonomy (MailboxBackpressure, MailboxRoutingDenied, MailboxLeaseAcquired/Expired/Takeover, MtCancelRequested/Forced/CleanupFailed, MtStarved, MtExecError, Mt015DistillationCandidate, CheckpointOverflow/ShutdownForced, ReplayStarted/Progress/Completed/Failed, RestartResume{Started,SessionResumed,SessionRecoveryFailed,DbUnavailable,Completed}, SpanStarted/Ended/Failed). FR_EVENT_REGISTRY.json governance manifest landed at .GOV/roles_shared/records/FR_EVENT_REGISTRY.json. as_str/from_str round-trip + Rust-JSON alignment tests prove enum and manifest agree.

spec_realism_gate_self_check.sub_rule_1_no_deferred_live_escape: PASS — grep across fr_event_registry.rs surfaces no '*Unavailable' code-path escape (FrEventId::RestartResumeDbUnavailable is the named FR event for DB unavailability, a legitimate runtime observation, not a deferred-live escape).
spec_realism_gate_self_check.sub_rule_2_external_resource_touch: PASS — 10 unit tests exercise the typed enum + JSON manifest alignment + round-trip + unknown-string typed rejection.

red_team_coverage.rust_json_alignment_test: covered — test enumerates Rust FrEventId variants and JSON manifest entries; asserts exact set equality; either drift fails CI.
red_team_coverage.json_schema_validation: covered — JSON manifest has schema:"handshake.fr_event_registry@1" string-validated; deeper JSON Schema enforcement deferred to the schema-registry MT (out of MT-198 owned scope).
red_team_coverage.adopter_refactor_obligations_noted: noted — MT-182/186/188/189/191/192/193/195 will adopt FrEventId.as_str() in their own MT lifecycles; MT-198 lands the type only.

residual_risks: PATH_SHAPE_DRIFT: contract names src/observability/ but actual is src/flight_recorder/. Same defect class as MT-197.
mod.rs out-of-owned-files edit needs operator waiver.
Adopter MTs (MT-182/186/188/189/191/192/193/195) will accumulate the refactor debt of replacing string literals with FrEventId.as_str() calls; tracked as cross-cutting obligation.
No Integration Validator has reviewed MT-198.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: FrEventId enum + .GOV/roles_shared/records/FR_EVENT_REGISTRY.json landed with full cluster X taxonomy (MailboxBackpressure, MailboxRoutingDenied, MailboxLeaseAcquired/Expired/Takeover, MtCancelRequested/Forced/CleanupFailed, MtStarved, MtExecError, Mt015DistillationCandidate, CheckpointOverflow/ShutdownForced, ReplayStarted/Progress/Completed/Failed, RestartResume* family, SpanStarted/Ended/Failed). 10/10 unit tests green. Rust enum + JSON manifest alignment test fails CI if either drifts (red_team #1 satisfied). Two real gaps: (1) JSON Schema validation of the manifest itself is deferred to a separate schema-registry MT; (2) adopter MTs (182/186/188/189/etc.) are still mid-refactor — backpressure emission demonstrably falls back to FlightRecorderEventType::System.
